name: Deployment Rings
description: Control-plane deployment management: targets, rings, events, and tenant configuration for staged rollouts.

reports.name: Deployment History
reports.description: All deployment events ordered by most recent

reports.name: Failed Deployments
reports.description: Deployment events that failed or were rolled back

reports.name: Active Targets by Ring
reports.description: All active deployment targets grouped by deployment ring

permissions.description: Full access to deployment ring configuration
Full access to deployment targets including disable/drain
Create deployment events (used by CI/CD pipelines)

roles.description: Read-only access to all deployment and tenant data
Can deploy and manage targets, view all deployment data
Full control over deployment rings, targets, events, and tenant configs
